sql.where:
and usb.enabled = true
and ubc.parent_bsns_cl_id = #{parentBsnsClId}
and ubc.bsns_cl_id = #{bsnsClId}
and usb.stdr_bsns_cd like concat('%', #{stdrBsnsCd}, '%')
and usb.stdr_bsns_nm like concat('%', #{stdrBsnsNm}, '%')
and ci.member_nm like concat('%', #{chargerNm}, '%')
and usb.chrg_dept_nm like concat('%', #{chrgDeptNm}, '%')

mapper.select: /** UsptStdrBsnsDao.selectListCount */ select count(usb.stdr_bsns_cd) as cnt from uspt_stdr_bsns usb inner join uspt_bsns_cl ubc on ubc.bsns_cl_id = usb.bsns_cl_id left outer join uspt_stdr_charger usc on usc.stdr_bsns_cd = usb.stdr_bsns_cd and usc.reprsnt_charger = true left outer join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = usc.insider_id

/** UsptStdrBsnsDao.selectList */ select usb.stdr_bsns_cd , usb.stdr_bsns_nm , usb.begin_year , usc.insider_id , ci.member_nm as charger_nm , usb.chrg_dept_nm , coalesce((select bsns_cl_nm || ' > ' from uspt_bsns_cl where bsns_cl_id = ubc.parent_bsns_cl_id and enabled = true), '') || ubc.bsns_cl_nm as bsns_cl_nm , to_char(usb.created_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as reg_dt , row_number() over (order by usb.created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_stdr_bsns usb inner join uspt_bsns_cl ubc on ubc.bsns_cl_id = usb.bsns_cl_id left outer join uspt_stdr_charger usc on usc.stdr_bsns_cd = usb.stdr_bsns_cd and usc.reprsnt_charger = true left outer join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = usc.insider_id
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptStdrBsnsDao.select */ select usb.stdr_bsns_cd , usb.bsns_cl_id , (select parent_bsns_cl_id from uspt_bsns_cl where bsns_cl_id = usb.bsns_cl_id ) as parent_bsns_cl_id , usb.stdr_bsns_nm , usb.begin_year , usb.tot_bsns_pd , usb.bsns_type_cd , usb.cnsrtm , usb.chrg_dept_nm , usb.bsns_sumry , usb.ecshg_instt_nm , usb.ecshg_instt_cd , usb.erp_cd , usb.task_type_cd , usb.creator_id from uspt_stdr_bsns usb where usb.stdr_bsns_cd = #{stdrBsnsCd}
